name: Currency Converter
description: Convert fiat and crypto currencies using live exchange rates from multiple providers.

preferences.name: Fiat Provider
preferences.description: Exchange rate source for fiat currencies. Free providers require no API key. If the selected provider fails, the plugin falls back through the free providers automatically.

options.text: Fawaz Exchange API (free, no key, 200+ currencies)
Open Exchange Rates (API key required, 1000 req/mo)

preferences.name: Fiat API Key
preferences.description: API key for the selected fiat provider (leave blank for free providers).

preferences.name: Crypto Provider
preferences.description: Price source for cryptocurrency conversions. All three offer a free tier.

options.text: CoinGecko (free Demo key recommended for stability)

preferences.name: CoinGecko API Key
preferences.description: Free Demo API key from coingecko.com (no credit card). Provides stable 30 req/min instead of unreliable 5-15 req/min without key.

preferences.name: Default From Currency
preferences.description: 3-letter ISO code used when no source currency is typed (e.g. USD).

preferences.name: Default To Currency
preferences.description: 3-letter ISO code used when no target currency is typed (e.g. EUR).

preferences.name: Cache Duration
preferences.description: How long to reuse cached exchange rates before fetching fresh data.

preferences.name: Display Locale
preferences.description: Babel locale code for Alt+Enter formatted output (e.g. pt_BR, en_US, de_DE). Leave blank to use each currency's own native locale.
